author: qf3l3k
description: Open a SQLite database from a vault path, list user tables, and preview rows. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: qf3l3k
manifest.description: Open a SQLite database from a vault path, list user tables, and preview rows.
manifest.name: SQLite Explorer

name: SQLite Explorer

releases.author: qf3l3k
releases.description:
﻿## [0.6.0] - 2026-04-21

### Changed

- Embedded the sql.js WebAssembly binary into main.js at build time.
- Removed the runtime dependency on ssets/sql-wasm.wasm, making release packaging compatible with the standard Obsidian Community Plugin asset set.

### Technical Notes

- Releases now only need manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css.
- Database access remains desktop-only and read-only; vault database files are still loaded from disk into in-memory SQLite sessions.

releases.author: qf3l3k
releases.description:
﻿## [0.5.0] - 2026-04-09

### Changed

- **Toolbar redesign** — the meta bar (filename + table count) is folded into the single toolbar row, saving a full row of vertical space in the chrome area.
- **Stable toggle labels** — Schema and Query buttons now use fixed labels with Obsidian's mod-cta accent style when active, replacing the verbose "Show/Hide Schema" / "Show/Hide Query" pattern. ria-pressed is set on both buttons for accessibility.
- **Copy Markdown and Export CSV** moved from the toolbar into the result header, placing them directly next to the row count they act on.
- Result header title now shows the actual selected table name or "Custom query" instead of the hardcoded "Table" label.

### Fixed

- Schema and Query toggle buttons previously had no visible active indication because color-mix(... transparent) was overridden by Obsidian's button reset. Replaced with Obsidian's native mod-cta class for a reliable accent highlight.

releases.author: qf3l3k
releases.description:
﻿## [0.4.0] - 2026-04-09

### Added

- **Column type hints** — each column header in the result grid now shows the SQLite declared type (e.g. integer, 	ext) as a small muted label below the column name. The schema is fetched once per render and shared with the schema panel, so no extra query is issued.
- **Cmd+Enter / Ctrl+Enter** keyboard shortcut runs the query in the query runner. The Run button tooltip and the hint text below the editor are updated to mention the shortcut.
- **Sticky first column** — the first column remains visible when scrolling a wide table horizontally. The hover highlight is blended against the solid background so it appears correctly over the sticky cell.

### Changed

- Query runner error message is now shown immediately below the Run/Reset buttons, above the "Allowed: SELECT…" hint line, so errors are easier to spot.
-  ormatCellAsText extracted from exportHelpers.ts and reused in sqliteQueryEmbed.ts, removing a duplicate private function.

### Fixed

- Client-side column sorting: clicking a column header sorts the currently loaded rows by that column. A second click reverses the direction; NULL values always sort last. Sort resets when switching tables or running a new query.
- Type-aware cell rendering: NULL values show a 
ull badge, BLOB values show a size badge, and numeric values are right-aligned with tabular-nums font. The database browser now uses the same enderCell helper as embedded query blocks.
- Table row height, column separators, and max-width clamping tightened to match a denser Bases-style layout.

releases.author: qf3l3k
releases.description:
﻿## [0.3.0] - 2026-04-09

### Fixed

- SQL validation incorrectly rejected queries containing blocked keywords (e.g. UPDATE, DELETE) inside quoted identifiers or string literals. A stripLiterals() step now removes single-quoted strings, double-quoted identifiers, and backtick identifiers before the keyword scan.
- unReadOnlyQuery previously fetched the entire result set into memory before applying the row cap. A LIMIT safeMaxRows+1 clause is now injected at the SQL level when no LIMIT is already present, so only the needed rows are loaded. The same technique is applied to previewTable.
- SqliteQueryBlockRenderer.render() continued writing to the DOM after the component was unloaded. A cancelled flag set in onunload() guards all post-wait DOM writes and ensures the acquired session is released cleanly.

### Changed

- SqliteDatabaseView.renderLoadedState() decomposed into focused private helpers (enderMetaBar, enderToolbar, enderActiveQuery, enderResultHeader, enderResultGrid). Button onclick handlers are now wired immediately after the result is computed rather than ~150 lines after button creation.
- sqlite-query blocks now share a single database session per vault path when multiple blocks on the same note reference the same file. A SessionRegistry ref-counts open sessions and closes them once all renders on a page complete.
- All internal sqlite-poc-* CSS class names renamed to sqlite-*. Error messages and package.json description no longer reference "proof of concept".
- manifest.json and package.json versions are now kept in sync with the release tag.

### Added

- ESLint with @typescript-eslint/recommended rules. 
pm run lint and 
pm run lint:fix scripts added.
- "type": "module" added to package.json, eliminating Node module-type warnings during test runs.

### Removed

- 	otalRows field removed from QueryResult — no longer knowable without a separate COUNT(*) query once LIMIT injection is in place. UI now shows 500+ results instead of 500/10000 results.
- Empty placeholder file src/ui/SqliteExplorerView.ts deleted.

releases.author: qf3l3k
releases.description:
﻿## [0.2.0] - 2026-03-28

### Added

- Custom desktop SQLite file view for .sqlite, .sqlite3, and .db files opened directly from the vault.
- Table browser with sticky toolbar, table selector, schema inspection, read-only query runner, and result preview grid.
- sqlite-query fenced code block rendering in reading view with 	able, list, and alue modes.
- Embed action for sqlite-query blocks to replace live queries with static markdown snapshots and timestamps.
- Settings for preview row limit and maximum rendered query result size.
- Per-database persisted UI state for last selected table.
- Result export helpers for copying the current result as a Markdown table and exporting the current result as CSV.

### Changed

- Refined the database browser UI toward a denser, Bases-inspired table layout.
- Improved error handling, empty states, tooltips, and result truncation messaging.
- Updated README usage and documentation for desktop-first behavior, code blocks, embedding, and settings.

### Technical Notes

- SQLite access uses sql.js with the WASM binary loaded from disk at runtime.
- Database access remains operationally read-only via in-memory snapshots of vault database files.

releases.author: qf3l3k
releases.description:
﻿## [0.1.0] - 2026-03-28

### Added

- Initial desktop-only SQLite proof of concept for Obsidian.
- Support for opening vault SQLite database files in read-only mode from .sqlite, .sqlite3, and .db.
- User table listing and default SELECT * FROM <table> LIMIT n preview.
- Schema inspection panel for the selected table.
- Read-only query runner with validation for SELECT and WITH ... SELECT.

### Technical Notes

- Chosen SQLite library: sql.js, to avoid native Electron rebuild requirements and simplify plugin packaging.
